description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a striking geometric design, featuring a mix of black and white exterior walls and large floor-to-ceiling windows. The front yard is symmetrically lined with tall, conical evergreen trees and includes a driveway leading to a covered garage. A central staircase connects the ground level to an elevated terrace, which overlooks a backyard with a wooden deck, a swimming pool, and an outdoor umbrella seating area. The house has a combination of flat and hip roofs, with the main living spaces oriented toward the pool and garden. The rear facade is characterized by a grid of large windows, while the side elevations are more solid with minimal fenestration. The landscaping is minimalistic, emphasizing clean lines and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern two-story house with black and white walls, large windows, a pool, and symmetrical landscaping with tall evergreens.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, central staircase, terrace, pool, and symmetrical tree-lined landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the staircase, terrace, and the pool area with outdoor seating, as well as the house's geometric rooflines.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a grid of large windows, white brick walls, and the full row of tall evergreens along the property edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid black wall, minimal windows, and the continuation of the tree-lined landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows with asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch, wide steps, and a modern door integrated into a glass facade.
